---
title: "Welcome to My Website"
sidebar: false 
---

![](docs/linkedin%20fotoğrafım.png){fig-align="center" width="280"}![](docs/Gemini_Generated_Image_cub1n7cub1n7cub1.png){fig-align="center" width="400"}


**Click to download [CV](docs/mustafa_alp_ulas_cv.pdf)**

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, Sept 2021 - June 2026.

# Internships

-   **Internal and External Material Flow Planning Intern**, **Mercedes-Benz Türk A.Ş.** – Aksaray, Türkiye

-   **Project Quality Intern– HBT (Communication & Information Technologies)**, **ASELSAN** - Ankara, Türkiye

# Projects

- Conducted data-driven analysis on EV adoption and CO₂ emission reduction in Turkey, emphasizing the influence of population density and renewable energy transition on sustainability outcomes. [(Project Website Link!)](https://emu-hacettepe-analytics.github.io/emu430-fall2024-team-nrg/)

# Work Experience

-   I have no work experience yet.

# Competencies

-   R, Python, SQL, Power BI, Excel VBA, Gurobi, Quality Management, Quality Assurance, Minitab

# Hobbies

-   Football, Table Tennis, Playing FPS Games, Downhill Biking, Tennis
